blocks.text: Barça vs Atleti twice in five days: La Liga and Champions League collide
Four points clear of Real Madrid, Barça visit the Metropolitano Saturday — then face Atlético again at Camp Nou on Wednesday in the Champions League quarterfinal. Win both and the season is theirs.
🚴 Tour of Flanders — Sun 10:00 — Seven Norwegians on the cobbles from Antwerp to Oudenaarde
